## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests passed (`pytest --cov=app tests/`)
- [ ] Frontend tests passed (`npm test`)
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed (login, dashboard, AI advisor)

## Screenshots or Logs

Add UI screenshots or terminal output when relevant.

## Risk Review

- [ ] Security impact checked (auth, secrets, input validation)
- [ ] Database impact checked (schema, seed, migration)
- [ ] Rollback plan documented (if production-impacting)

## Branch and Commit Quality

- [ ] Branch follows naming: `feature/*`, `fix/*`, `docs/*`, `chore/*`
- [ ] Commits are small and use Conventional Commits
- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern
